title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:1
body: Did We not expand an interrogative meant as an affirmative in other words ‘We did indeed expand’ your breast for you O Muhammad (s) by means of prophethood and otherwise

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:2
body: and relieve you of your burden

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:3
body: that which weighed down your back? — this is similar to where God says that God may forgive you what is past of your sin Q. 482.

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:4
body: Did We not exalt your mention? For you are mentioned where I God am mentioned in the call announcing the time for prayer adhān in the second call to perform the prayer iqāma in the witnessing ‘there is no god but God Muhammad is His Messenger’ tashahhud in the Friday sermon and in other instances.

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:5
body: For truly with hardship comes ease.

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:6
body: Truly with hardship comes ease the Prophet s suffered much hardship at the hands of the disbelievers but then he enjoyed ease when he was assisted to victory by God over them.

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:7
body: So when you are finished from performing prayer toil exert yourself in supplication to God

title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn — English · 94:8
body: and seek devote yourself humbly to your Lord.
